title: App Data Save System
description: Create a save system that stores user data and caches in the appropriate App Data directory (e.g., %APPDATA% on Windows, ~/Library/Application Support on macOS, ~/.local/share on Linux). This enables persistent settings, cached test files, and user preferences across sessions.
definition-of-done: Save system initialized in App Data directory. Caches stored in platform-appropriate location. Settings persist across app restarts. Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
testing-plan: Verify directory is created on first run. Test saving and loading cache files. Verify settings persist after restart. Test on multiple platforms.
todos: Create AppDataManager class to handle platform-specific paths
Detect OS and return appropriate App Data path
Create Ixdar subdirectory structure (cache/, settings/, etc.)
Migrate test file cache to App Data location
Add methods for reading/writing settings files
Update FileManagement to use AppDataManager for caches
unknowns: What data needs to be persisted beyond test file cache
Whether to use JSON, Properties, or binary format for settings
